jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at 5paisa - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa:
5paisa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
